_note: Mock 1-month food delivery history matching Knot /transactions/sync schema. Drop-in replacement for real sandbox data (which is 2024 dated and non-food). Each `sync_responses[i]` mimics one real Knot /transactions/sync call result. For MongoDB storage, flatten merchants[i].transactions with merchant field injected. Source schema: samples/sync_doordash.json · Source patterns: ande/refined-flow.md
